item.description: Cut AWS costs by 50% with these optimization techniques

item.description: AI systems still struggle with tasks requiring human intuition and empathy

item.description: Open source business models can generate significant revenue with the right approach

item.description: Build AI-powered apps without ML knowledge using pre-trained models and APIs

item.description: Rust for Python and JavaScript developers, with performance benchmarks and real-world examples

item.description: Rate limiting strategies for APIs, including algorithm selection, implementation, and performance optimization.

item.description: Practical guide to vector databases and embeddings for developers

item.description: Practical MLOps tactics that keep deployments stable, fast, and cost‑effective, with real code and hard‑won numbers.

item.description: Kafka, RabbitMQ, and SQS compared

item.title: Lazy Load
item.description: Improve web app performance with lazy loading and code splitting

item.title: Micro-FE
item.description: Micro-frontend architecture for scalable apps

item.title: Data Pipelines That Survive Production
item.description: Real-world tactics for building data pipelines that survive production. Includes code, benchmarks, and tools that prevent silent failures.

item.title: AI Code Tools Beat Junior Devs
item.description: AI tools now write cleaner, faster, more secure code than most junior developers. Real benchmarks, tool comparisons, and when to avoid them.

item.title: Beat Algos
item.description: Beat social media algorithms with high-quality content

item.title: Platform Engineering: Beyond Internal Tooling
item.description: Internal developer platforms reduce cognitive load by 50%+—here’s how we cut onboarding from 4.2 days to 37 minutes using Backstage, Argo CD, and OPA.
